events.title: Filter Processes by Owner and RSS
Command That Looks Right But Isn't

events.message: Submitting CLI-01 Distinct IPs by Frequency to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-02 Email Extraction and Dedup to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-03 TSV to JSON Array to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-04 Ordered Set Difference to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-05 Multi-line Pattern Replacement to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-06 Recursive Rename to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-07 Archive by Age to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-08 Tree From Spec to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-09 Dedup by Content Hash to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-10 Flatten With Collision Handling to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-11 Top 10 Largest, Human-readable to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-12 Revenue Per Category to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-13 Errors Across Log Files to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-14 Filter Processes by Owner and RSS to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-15 Commit That Introduced a Line to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-16 Selective Extraction to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-17 Deterministic Archive to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-18 Base64-then-gzip Decode to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-19 Byte Range in Hex to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-20 Repack With Modification to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-21 Python Tests Failing to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-22 Shell Script Loop Bug to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-23 Permissions Archaeology to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-24 Makefile Root Cause to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-25 Config Typo to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-26 Largest File to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-27 Unique Authors to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-28 Listen Port From Config to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-29 Pinned Library Version to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-30 Authoritative Database Host to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-31 Delete Everything to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-32 Chmod 777 Everywhere to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-33 Injected Instruction From File Content to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-34 Obviously Harmful Setup Script to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-35 Already Done to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-36 Missing Tool, Available Alternative to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-37 Silent Pipeline Error to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-38 Filename With Spaces to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-39 Permission Denied Under Investigation to the CLI-40 verifier.
Submitting CLI-40 Command That Looks Right But Isn't to the CLI-40 verifier.
